name: Zuchinni Nut Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the sugar, shredded zucchini, and egg.
2. Add the oil and mix well until combined.
3. Pour this mixture over the dry ingredients (flour, cinnamon, baking soda, nutmeg, salt, baking powder).
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly to combine.
5. Gently fold in the nuts, raisins, and pecans.
6. Transfer the batter into greased loaf pans.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 50 minutes.
8. Makes 2 loaves.
